hero.title: Crumble into
hero.description: Chewy, gooey American-style cookies delivered fresh to your door. No account needed — just pick your favorites and we'll bake it happen.

shop.description: Browse our selection of freshly baked American-style cookies and pre-made boxes. All cookies are made to order with premium ingredients.

product.minOrderNote: Minimum 3 cookies required for checkout. Free delivery in Oran.
